RedeemCode.title: Redeem Code
RedeemCode.description: A unique code to unlock Pro access.

isUsed.description: Whether the code has been used.

usedBy.description: The UID of the user who used the code.

usedAt.description: The timestamp when the code was used.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the code was created.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: The profile of a user, including their Pro status.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

isPro.description: Whether the user has Pro access.

proUnlockedAt.description: The timestamp when Pro access was unlocked.
